# Vendored Web Asset Licenses

This directory contains third-party assets vendored for offline/runtime use.

- Package: `monaco-editor`
- Version: `0.52.2`
- Source: <https://www.npmjs.com/package/monaco-editor>
- License: MIT
- Copyright: Microsoft Corporation

- Version: `4.3.1`
